title: habenaria obtusata
intro: Habenaria obtusata is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, commonly known as the "tuberose orchid" due to its fragrant, waxy flowers that bloom in the evening and night. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Habenaria obtusata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and safety should be further researched and validated.
